title: lastrea heineri
intro: Lastrea heineri, also known as Heiner's fern, is a species of fern native to the Himalayas. It is an edible plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is rich in vitamins and minerals, and its extracts have been found to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Lastrea heineri can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to support digestive health.
